# datahub_ownership_type (Data Source)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Looks up an existing DataHub ownership type by `type_id`.

Use this to reference an ownership type -- including the built-in system types (`__system__technical_owner`, `__system__business_owner`, `__system__data_steward`, `__system__none`) -- without taking ownership of it in Terraform state.

Custom ownership types managed by the `datahub_ownership_type` resource can also be looked up here if you need a cross-module URN reference.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `type_id` (String) The unique identifier of the ownership type to look up (the URN suffix, e.g. `data_quality_lead` or `__system__technical_owner`).

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the ownership type. Empty if not set.
- `name` (String) Human-readable display name of the ownership type.
- `urn` (String) Full DataHub URN for this ownership type (e.g. `urn:li:ownershipType:data_quality_lead`).
